_doc: Batch 7 — 50 distinct, concurrency scenarios. Each is a unique transformation.

setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(8)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(4)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(10)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(12)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent reads of same file (16 threads)
setup: cp {src_pdf_small} {vfs}/shared

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): f=open(sys.argv[1],"rb"); d=f.read(); f.close(); import hashlib; print(hashlib.md5(d).hexdigest()[:8]); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(16)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/shared
for i in $(seq 1 8); do cp {src_pdf_small} {vfs}/c$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): f=open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/c{i}","rb"); d=f.read(); f.close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(1,9)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): import os; os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/d{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(sys.argv[1],"w").write(f"thread{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/concurrent

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(sys.argv[1],"a").write(f"x{i}\n"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/append

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os,time; def writer(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/w{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(5)]; def reader(_): [open(os.path.join(sys.argv[1], f),"r").close() for f in os.listdir(sys.argv[1])]; ts=[]; [ts.append(threading.Thread(target=writer,args=(i,))) for i in range(2)]; [ts.append(threading.Thread(target=reader,args=(i,))) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}
for i in $(seq 1 16); do touch {vfs}/del$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): [os.remove(f"{sys.argv[1]}/del{i*4+j}") for j in range(1,5)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}/sub"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}
echo data > {vfs}/seq1
echo data > {vfs}/seq2
cat {vfs}/seq1 {vfs}/seq2

scenarios.description: Concurrent writes to different files (no contention)
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/f{i}","w").write(f"content{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Many parallel reads on same file
setup: python3 -c 'import sys; open(sys.argv[1],"wb").write(b"x"*100000)' {vfs}/readtest

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): open(sys.argv[1],"rb").read(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(32)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/readtest

scenarios.description: Concurrent mkdir of same name (one wins, others fail)
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(_): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/contend", exist_ok=True); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent cp of same file to different dests
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): import shutil; shutil.copy(sys.argv[1], f"{sys.argv[2]}/c{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {src_pdf_small} {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent write/read same file (sequential then parallel read)
setup: python3 -c 'import sys; open(sys.argv[1],"wb").write(b"Y"*50000)' {vfs}/rw
python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): open(sys.argv[1],"rb").read(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/rw

scenarios.description: Sequential thread group doing dir operations
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/d{i}"); open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/d{i}/file","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(6)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: 2 threads, each does cp -R small tree
setup: mkdir -p {vfs}/src0/A {vfs}/src1/A
touch {vfs}/src0/A/x {vfs}/src1/A/y

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,shutil; def w(i): shutil.copytree(f"{sys.argv[1]}/src{i}", f"{sys.argv[1]}/dst{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: 4 threads, mix of creates and deletes
setup: for i in $(seq 1 12); do touch {vfs}/m$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/new{i}_{j}","w").close() for j in range(3)]; def d(_): [os.remove(f"{sys.argv[1]}/m{j}") for j in range(1,4)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)] + [threading.Thread(target=d,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent reads with different offsets (sequential file)
setup: python3 -c 'import sys; open(sys.argv[1],"wb").write(bytes(range(256))*100)' {vfs}/bytes

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(off): f=open(sys.argv[1],"rb"); f.seek(off); print(f.read(1)); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(off,)) for off in [0,1000,5000,10000,50000,100000]]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/bytes

scenarios.description: Concurrent mv (same src to different dst)
setup: touch {vfs}/srccc

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.rename(f"{sys.argv[1]}/srccc", f"{sys.argv[1]}/dst{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/indep{i}","wb").write(bytes([i%256])*1000); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(16)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/d{i}/a/b/c"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent reads on many small files
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/rf{i}","wb").write(str(i).encode()); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(16)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/rf{i}","rb").read(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(16)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/top{i}/mid/bot"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent 4 threads creating files in same dir
setup: mkdir {vfs}/sharedir

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/sharedir/t{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(4)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/f{i}","wb").write(bytes([i])*100) for _ in [1]]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]; def r(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/f{i}","rb").read(); ts2=[threading.Thread(target=r,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t2 in ts2]; [t.join() for t2 in ts2]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/s{i}_a","w").close(); open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/s{i}_b","w").close(); open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/s{i}_c","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent writes + reads of same content
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; data=b"shared_data"*100; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/shared{i}","wb").write(data); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent 2 threads, each create different subdirs
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/s{i}/inner{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(2)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Sequential: write to file then concurrent reads
setup: python3 -c 'import sys; open(sys.argv[1],"wb").write(b"R"*10000)' {vfs}/after_write

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): open(sys.argv[1],"rb").read(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/after_write
for i in $(seq 1 4); do touch {vfs}/pre$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.rename(f"{sys.argv[1]}/pre{i}", f"{sys.argv[1]}/post{i}"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(1,5)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent file creation by 8 threads (8 each)
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): [open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}_f{j}","w").close() for j in range(8)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent rm by 4 threads (each removes different files)
setup: for i in $(seq 1 16); do touch {vfs}/rm$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): [os.remove(f"{sys.argv[1]}/rm{i*4+j}") for j in range(1,5)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/big{i}","wb").write(b"\0"*1048576); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}
touch {vfs}/x

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(_): os.rename(f"{sys.argv[1]}/x", f"{sys.argv[1]}/y"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(3)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent reads verify all return same MD5
setup: cp {src_pdf_small} {vfs}/md5file

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,hashlib; results=[]; def w(_): f=open(sys.argv[1],"rb"); results.append(hashlib.md5(f.read()).hexdigest()); f.close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(16)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]; print(set(results).__len__())' {vfs}/md5file
mkdir {vfs}/sub1 {vfs}/sub2

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/sub{(i%2)+1}/f{i}","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}
for i in $(seq 1 8); do touch {vfs}/orig$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os,shutil; def cp(i): shutil.copy(f"{sys.argv[1]}/orig{i}", f"{sys.argv[1]}/copy{i}"); def rm(_): [os.remove(f"{sys.argv[1]}/orig{j}") for j in range(1,9)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=cp,args=(i,)) for i in range(1,9)] + [threading.Thread(target=rm,args=(1,))]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent reads on cp -R created tree
setup: mkdir -p {vfs}/tree/A/B
touch {vfs}/tree/A/B/file
cp -R {vfs}/tree {vfs}/tree_copy/

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/tree_copy/tree/A/B/file","rb").read(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent thread batch of mixed ops
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/op{i}_a","w").close(); os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/op{i}_dir"); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(6)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}
python3 -c 'import sys; open(sys.argv[1],"wb").write(b"Z"*1000000)' {vfs}/burst

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): f=open(sys.argv[1],"rb"); f.read(1000); f.close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(10)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}/burst
for i in $(seq 1 32); do touch {vfs}/br$i; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): [os.remove(f"{sys.argv[1]}/br{i*8+j}") for j in range(1,9)]; ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent ops spanning 4 different mount subdirs
setup: for d in a b c d; do mkdir {vfs}/$d; done

python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(i): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/{{"abcd"[i]}}/x","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): f=open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/sync{i}","wb"); f.write(b"S"*1000); f.flush(); os.fsync(f.fileno()); f.close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(8)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent: many short-lived threads doing single ops
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading; def w(_): open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/short_{threading.current_thread().ident}","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(50)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}

scenarios.description: Concurrent tree: each thread makes own sub-tree
setup: python3 -c 'import sys,threading,os; def w(i): os.makedirs(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}/sub/deeper"); open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}/sub/file","w").close(); open(f"{sys.argv[1]}/t{i}/sub/deeper/inner","w").close(); ts=[threading.Thread(target=w,args=(i,)) for i in range(4)]; [t.start() for t in ts]; [t.join() for t in ts]' {vfs}
